# BH Labs — Turnkey Recovery Pods

## About
BH Labs is a Miami-based biohacking and wellness company that installs turnkey Recovery Pods in hotels, resorts, and luxury residential properties. Each pod includes clinical-grade equipment: HBOT (Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy), red light therapy, infrared sauna, lymphatic drainage, and PEMF (Pulsed Electromagnetic Field) devices.

## Key Facts
- Complete pod investment: approximately $45,000
- Hotel revenue: $27,000+/month ($324,000/year)
- Residential revenue: $4,500+/month ($45,000+/year)
- Hotel payback period: under 2 months
- Residential payback period: approximately 10 months
- No additional staff required — existing staff trained and certified
- Based in Miami, FL
- Contact: info@thebiohacklab.com | 954-870-5814

## Pages
- Hotels & Resorts: https://www.bh-labs.com/
- Luxury Residential: https://www.bh-labs.com/residential

## Equipment Included
1. HBOT Chamber — Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy
2. Red Light Therapy Panels
3. Infrared Sauna
4. Compression Therapy Boots
5. Lymphatic Drainage Suits
6. PEMF Device
7. PEMF Treatment Station

## Revenue Model (Hotels)
- ADR wellness surcharge: $5/night across rooms
- A-la-carte walk-in sessions: ~$20/session
- Combined: $27,000+/month

## Revenue Model (Residential)
- Monthly wellness fee per unit: ~$30
- 150 units at 95% participation = $4,275+/month

## Notable Clients
- Equinox
- Reserve Padel Solemia
- Dr. Johnny Salomon's Medical Facility

## Sources
- Global Wellness Institute (2024): Wellness tourists spend 41-175% more than average travelers
- Global Wellness Institute (2025): Wellness-integrated properties see 10-25% property value increase
